test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to Supplier Returns list page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-return/return; Wait for page to load; Verify page title
expected_result: Returns list page loads with title 'Supplier Returns'; Data table visible with columns: #, Return Number, GRN Number, Supplier, Return Date, Status; 'New Return' button visible; Status filter dropdown visible; Search input visible

test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to New Return page
test_step: Click 'New Return' button; Wait for navigation to /console/modules/supplier-return/return/add
expected_result: Create return page loads with title 'New Supplier Return'; GRN selection dropdown visible; Return Date field pre-filled with today; Notes field visible; Line items section shows 'Select a GRN to see returnable items'

test_desc: Smoke - Create supplier return against a stock_updated GRN
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-return/return/add; Select a GRN in 'stock_updated' status; Verify returnable items load with Accepted, Already Ret., Returnable columns; Set return qty on at least one item; Select reason code 'defective'; Click 'Create Return'
expected_result: Supplier return created with status 'requested'; Auto-generated return number (SR-YYYYMM-NNNN); Success toast appears; Redirected to returns list; New return visible in list with Requested status badge

test_desc: Smoke - View supplier return detail page
test_step: Navigate to returns list; Click on return number link
expected_result: Return detail page loads; Status timeline shows 7 stages (Requested through Closed) with Requested active; Header shows return number, GRN (clickable link), PO (clickable link), supplier, location, return date; Line items table shows Product, SKU, Qty, UOM, Reason, Notes; Action buttons: 'Submit for Approval', 'Approve (Skip)', 'Reject', 'Download PDF'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Status transition Requested to Pending Approval
test_step: On return detail (requested status); Click 'Submit for Approval' button
expected_result: Return status changes to 'pending_approval'; Status timeline advances to step 2; Toast shows success; Action buttons change to 'Approve' and 'Reject'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Status transition Pending Approval to Approved
test_step: On return in pending_approval status; Click 'Approve' button
expected_result: Return status changes to 'approved'; Status timeline advances to step 3; Action button changes to 'Mark Dispatched'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Status transition Approved to Dispatched
test_step: On return in approved status; Click 'Mark Dispatched' button
expected_result: Return status changes to 'dispatched'; Dispatched At timestamp recorded; Action button changes to 'Mark Acknowledged'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Status transition Dispatched to Acknowledged
test_step: On return in dispatched status; Click 'Mark Acknowledged' button
expected_result: Return status changes to 'acknowledged'; Acknowledged At timestamp recorded; Action buttons: 'Record Credit Note' and 'Close (No Credit)'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Record credit note and transition to Credit Note Received
test_step: On return in acknowledged status; Click 'Record Credit Note'; Fill credit note number 'CN-2026-001'; Fill amount 500000; Fill credit date; Click 'Record Credit Note'
expected_result: Credit note recorded successfully; Return status changes to 'credit_note_received'; Credit Notes section appears showing CN details with amount in IDR currency format; Action buttons: 'Add Credit Note' and 'Close Return'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Close return after credit note
test_step: On return in credit_note_received status; Click 'Close Return'
expected_result: Return status changes to 'closed' (terminal); Status timeline fully complete; Closed At timestamp recorded; No more action buttons except Download PDF

test_desc: Full CRUD - Skip approval: Requested to Approved directly
test_step: Create new return; On detail page; Click 'Approve (Skip)' button
expected_result: Return status changes directly to 'approved' (bypassing pending_approval); Action button shows 'Mark Dispatched'

test_desc: Full CRUD - Reject return from requested status
test_step: Create new return; On detail page; Click 'Reject' button; Fill rejection reason 'Items not eligible for return'; Click 'Reject' in dialog
expected_result: Return status changes to 'rejected' (terminal); Rejected banner appears with reason text; No action buttons; Status timeline replaced by rejected banner

test_desc: Full CRUD - Status filter on returns list
test_step: Navigate to returns list; Select 'Requested' from status filter; Observe results; Select 'Closed'; Observe results; Select 'All Statuses'
expected_result: Requested filter: only requested returns shown; Closed filter: only closed returns; All: all returns visible

test_desc: Full CRUD - Search returns by number or supplier
test_step: Navigate to returns list; Type return number in search; Observe results; Clear; Type supplier name; Observe results
expected_result: Search by return number filters correctly; Search by supplier name shows matching returns; Results update dynamically

test_desc: Full CRUD - Download supplier return PDF
test_step: Navigate to return detail; Click 'Download PDF' button
expected_result: PDF file downloaded with return number as filename; No errors in console

test_desc: Full CRUD - Navigate to Credit Notes list
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/supplier-return/credit-note; Verify page loads
expected_result: Credit Notes list page loads with title 'Credit Notes'; Table shows columns: #, Credit Note #, Return #, Supplier, Amount, Date, Type, Notes; Search input visible

test_desc: Edge Case - Return number format
test_step: Create a return; Check generated number
expected_result: Return number matches format SR-YYYYMM-NNNN (e.g. SR-202604-0001)

test_desc: Edge Case - Multiple reason codes on different items
test_step: Create return with multiple items; Set different reason codes per item (defective, damaged, expired)
expected_result: Each item shows its own reason code in the detail view; All 5 reason codes selectable: defective, damaged, expired, excess, wrong_item

test_desc: Edge Case - Returnable quantity validation
test_step: After creating a return for some items; Try to create another return for same GRN; Verify already returned quantities deducted from returnable
expected_result: Returnable qty = accepted qty - already returned qty; Cannot return more than returnable

test_desc: Edge Case - GRN link from return detail
test_step: On return detail page; Click GRN number link
expected_result: Navigates to GRN detail page; GRN shows correct data

test_desc: Edge Case - PO link from return detail
test_step: On return detail page; Click PO number link
expected_result: Navigates to PO detail page; PO shows correct data

test_desc: Edge Case - Replacement receipt credit note
test_step: On acknowledged return; Record credit note with 'is replacement' checked
expected_result: Credit note shows type 'Replacement' instead of 'Credit'; Blue badge instead of green

test_desc: Edge Case - Close return without credit note
test_step: On acknowledged return; Click 'Close (No Credit)' button
expected_result: Return closes directly without needing credit note; Status changes to 'closed'

test_desc: Edge Case - Breadcrumbs and Cancel navigation
test_step: On add page; Click Cancel; On view page; Click 'Returns List' breadcrumb
expected_result: Cancel returns to list page; Breadcrumb navigates back to list page

test_desc: Edge Case - Sort columns on returns list
test_step: Click Return Number column header; Click Return Date column header
expected_result: URL updates with sort=returnNumber; URL updates with sort=returnDate; Sort toggles asc/desc

test_desc: Edge Case - Credit note appears in Credit Notes list
test_step: After recording a credit note on a return; Navigate to Credit Notes list
expected_result: Credit note visible in list; Shows correct CN#, return#, supplier, amount, date, type
